summary: Project includes music/video upload for Gail and now adding profile/content deletion features.

existing_features.title: Add a 'Delete Profile' option to the user's profile area that allows an authenticated user to permanently delete their profile from the platform. The action must prompt the user with a confirmation dialog before proceeding. Upon successful deletion, the user should be logged out and redirected to the feed page.

Add an optional 'Delete Content' button to each content item that the authenticated user owns. The button should only be visible to the content owner. Clicking it must show a confirmation dialog before permanently deleting the content item. After deletion, the content item should be removed from the feed.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add delete profile option for users
